judge_scores.reasoning: The model correctly identifies the 8-year ineligibility and the reason, but miscalculates the end date by one year.
The response incorrectly states the duration of ineligibility as lasting until June 30, 2031, instead of correctly stating it ends in 2030.
The response correctly states the duration of the ineligibility as 8 years until 2030 and mentions the reason as abuse of electoral power and misuse of communication means during the 2022 campaign.
